creator: cpetrik@proton.me
text: ANd this is using the current 11.2 with the current mbedtls patches applied Hiawatha is basically all mbedtls you would have to hack it to make it compatible with mbedtls2 last time I asked the response was "mbedtls2 is the lastest stable release" which made no sense as I had working patches for mbedtls3. Again this has been an issue for 4 years now
